Politics.headline: Trump gives Iran 48 hours to open Strait of Hormuz as search continues for missing US pilot
Politics.detail: Amidst ongoing conflict, President Trump has issued an ultimatum to Iran, demanding the country reopen the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours while the search for a missing U.S. pilot continues. A senior Iranian military official has rejected President Trump's ultimatum, calling it "a helpless, nervous, unbalanced and stupid action."

Politics.headline: Trump files emergency appeal to keep building White House ballroom
Politics.detail: The Justice Department has filed an emergency appeal to pause a ruling that halted construction of the White House ballroom, stating that delaying construction puts the president at risk. Justice Department lawyers wrote, “Time is of the essence!”

Politics.headline: Trump proposes $10B fund for D.C. construction, beautification projects
Politics.detail: President Trump is proposing a $10 billion fund for construction and beautification projects in Washington, D.C. Trump also wants $10B to fund new projects in and around Washington DC.

Politics.headline: Vance tapped as 'fraud czar' as Trump targets blue states over taxpayer theft
Politics.detail: JD Vance has been appointed as 'fraud czar' as President Trump focuses on addressing taxpayer theft in blue states.

Politics.headline: US revokes green cards and visas of several Iranian nationals connected to Tehran government
Politics.detail: The United States has revoked the green cards and visas of several Iranian nationals with ties to the Tehran government.

Finance & Economy.headline: Vietnam secures stable fuel supply through end-April
Finance & Economy.detail: Vietnam's domestic fuel supply is expected to remain stable through the end of April, despite mounting volatility in global energy markets driven by escalating tensions in the Middle East. Deputy Minister of Industry and Trade Nguyen Sinh Nhat Tan stated that the military conflict in the Middle East since late February has had far-reaching consequences, particularly for global energy supply chains.

Finance & Economy.headline: Vietnam's middle class solidifies as monthly household incomes climb to $831
Finance & Economy.detail: Vietnam's household income reached a new milestone in 2026, with the national average rising to VND21.9 million ($831.4) per month, according to the latest survey covering over 14,000 respondents by Q&Me Vietnam Market Research.

Finance & Economy.headline: Finance Minister prioritises development financing, curbs commercial borrowing
Finance & Economy.detail: Egypt's Finance Minister Ahmed Kouchouk said the government is working to reduce budget sector debt and the overall deficit, while maintaining a primary surplus to lower debt servicing costs and create greater fiscal space for spending on human development and social protection. He also noted that allocations for subsidies, social protection and essential services will rise to help ease pressures on low- and middle-income groups.

Finance & Economy.headline: Stock markets begin FY27 on a high, Sensex jumps 1,186 points on de-escalation hopes
Finance & Economy.detail: Indian stock markets started FY27 positively, with the Sensex rising 1,186 points due to hopes of de-escalation.

Finance & Economy.headline: Oil Ministry confirms Iranian crude purchases, rejects claims of payment-led tanker diversion
Finance & Economy.detail: The Oil Ministry has confirmed purchases of Iranian crude oil and has denied claims that payments led to tanker diversions.

Technology.headline: Italian Consumers Score $500 Netflix Refund Amid 'Streamflation'
Technology.detail: Italian Netflix subscribers could be entitled to a refund of approximately 500 euros if they were subscribed continuously from 2017 through the time of writing.

Technology.headline: Windows 11 Abandoned Native Apps. Now It Needs Them to Survive
Technology.detail: Web apps made Windows slower, clunkier, and less compelling, and Microsoft is finally scrambling to fix it.

Technology.headline: Smart sensor decodes fatigue and stress from body signals on the move
Technology.detail: A smart sensor can decode fatigue and stress from body signals on the move.

Technology.headline: AI companions can comfort lonely users but may deepen distress over time
Technology.detail: AI companions can comfort lonely users, but research suggests they may also deepen distress over time.

Technology.headline: Lenovo's Legion Go 2 Is the Latest Console to Raise Prices
Technology.detail: The lower-end AMD Ryzen Z2 16GB RAM model has gone from $1,099.99 to $1,499.99, an increase of roughly 36%, while the higher-end Ryzen Z2 Extreme 32GB model has jumped almost 48% to $1,999.99.

Science.headline: Artemis astronauts preparing for historic lunar flyby
Science.detail: NASA's Artemis II mission, carrying astronauts, is preparing for a historic flyby of the moon, marking humanity's return to lunar voyages after decades. The mission aims to send humans around the moon for the first time since the Apollo program.

Science.headline: Climate Crisis Drives Mass Migration And Political Instability
Science.detail: A computer scientist argues that accelerating climate warming and extreme weather are already forcing large population movements, linking migration pressures to rising political polarization and fragile democracies. The piece highlights risks for Europe, the US, and developing regions.

Science.headline: Scientists unearth sea lion fossil first near Taiwan
Science.detail: A team of Taiwanese and Japanese scientists has identified sea lion fossils in waters around Taiwan proper, a breakthrough discovery that raises new questions about the species' range. The mammals once lived in the seas surrounding Japan before being hunted into extinction by humans, but their presence near Taiwan proper had not been known until now.

Science.headline: A Disturbing Pattern Emerges in Zoo Penguins With Unlimited Food
Science.detail: A disturbing pattern has emerged in zoo penguins with unlimited food. Details on the specific pattern were not available in the search results.

Science.headline: Stress tested, testing stress: Novel organoid models how the adrenal gland develops.
Science.detail: Novel organoid models are being used to understand how the adrenal gland develops and responds to stress. This research provides new tools for studying stress-related disorders.

Health.headline: New Drug Cuts Seizures by Up to 91% in Children With Rare Epilepsy
Health.detail: A recently developed medication has demonstrated a significant reduction in seizure frequency among children affected by rare forms of epilepsy, offering new hope for improved management of these conditions.

Health.headline: Scientists Create Programmable Drug System to Target Cancer Cells
Health.detail: Researchers have engineered a drug delivery system made from synthetic DNA that can precisely target and activate only in the presence of specific combinations of signals found on cancer cells, potentially minimizing side effects.

Health.headline: Gene Therapy Gives Deaf People the Chance to Hear
Health.detail: A novel gene therapy is showing promise in restoring hearing to individuals born deaf, with some patients experiencing improvements within weeks of treatment.

Health.headline: Massachusetts Man Receives Larynx Transplant After Cancer
Health.detail: Surgeons in Massachusetts successfully performed a larynx transplant on a man whose voice box was removed due to cancer; he is only the third patient in the U.S. to receive such a transplant and the first with active cancer.

Health.headline: When our minds wander to the body, it may affect mental health
Health.detail: A new study suggests that when people's minds wander to their bodily sensations, it may reduce symptoms of depression and ADHD.

Sports.headline: Malkin has 14th career hat trick, Penguins rout Panthers 9-4 to end Florida's bid for a 3-peat
Sports.detail: Evgeni Malkin scored his 14th career hat trick as the Penguins dominated the Panthers with a 9-4 victory, putting an end to Florida's hopes of winning three consecutive championships.

Sports.headline: Arteta says Arsenal going through 'difficult period' after stunning FA Cup loss
Sports.detail: Following a surprising defeat in the FA Cup, Arsenal's manager, Arteta, acknowledged that the team is currently facing a challenging phase.

Sports.headline: Jokic scores 40, outduels Wembanyama and Nuggets top Spurs 136-134 in OT
Sports.detail: Nikola Jokic scored 40 points in an impressive performance against Victor Wembanyama, leading the Nuggets to a 136-134 overtime victory over the Spurs.

Sports.headline: VALUE: Why Denver Broncos BENEFIT From J.K. Dobbins Return in 2026
Sports.detail: An analysis of why the Denver Broncos will benefit from the return of J.K. Dobbins in 2026.

Sports.headline: Ohtani, Tucker 2 of 5 Dodgers to Homer in Dominant Win Over Nationals
Sports.detail: Shohei Ohtani and Kyle Tucker were among five Dodgers players who hit home runs in a dominant win against the Nationals.

Entertainment.headline: Ranbir Kapoor confirms playing double role of Lord Rama and Lord Parshurama in Ramayana
Entertainment.detail: Actor Ranbir Kapoor has confirmed that he will be playing a double role in the upcoming film 'Ramayana', portraying both Lord Rama and Lord Parshurama. The film is anticipated to be a magnum opus.

Entertainment.headline: Judge dismisses Blake Lively's sexual harassment claims against Justin Baldoni
Entertainment.detail: A federal judge in New York has dismissed actor Blake Lively's sexual harassment claims against actor Justin Baldoni over their roles in the movie "It Ends With Us," but left intact a claim for retaliation. The legal battle between Lively and her former co-star and director, Justin Baldoni, continues.

Entertainment.headline: Tom Holland Declares Zendaya 'Looks Amazing' as They Step Out in Paris Amid Marriage Speculation
Entertainment.detail: Tom Holland told fans that Zendaya 'looks amazing' as they stepped out in Paris ahead of her "The Drama" premiere, amidst speculation about their marriage. The couple's appearance in Paris has fueled excitement among fans.

Entertainment.headline: JAY-Z Breaks Silence on Being Accused in Diddy Lawsuits
Entertainment.detail: JAY-Z has broken his silence regarding his name being mentioned in a 2024 sexual misconduct lawsuit connected to Sean 'Diddy' Combs, in a new 'GQ' interview. The interview addresses the allegations and JAY-Z's perspective on the matter.

Entertainment.headline: Bill Cosby Found Liable in Sexual Assault Case, Owes Victim $59M
Entertainment.detail: Bill Cosby has been found liable in a sexual assault case and is ordered to pay $59 million in damages to Donna Motsinger for drugging and assaulting her in 1972. The court's decision marks a significant development in the long-standing allegations against Cosby.

Crime & Justice.headline: WA man charged with damaging Commonwealth property at Perth Airport
Crime & Justice.detail: A man in Western Australia has been charged with damaging Commonwealth property at Perth Airport, according to the Australian Federal Police.

Crime & Justice.headline: Two men and teen remain in UK custody over Jewish ambulance attack
Crime & Justice.detail: Two men and a teenager are in custody in the UK after an attack on a Jewish ambulance; the suspects, Hamza Iqbal, Rehan Khan and a 17-year-old, were charged with arson and being reckless as to whether life would be endangered. Counterterror police are investigating the fire as an antisemitic hate crime.

Crime & Justice.headline: Meloni hails arrest of top crime family suspect after raid at an Italian resort
Crime & Justice.detail: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni has praised police after the arrest of alleged organized crime boss Roberto Mazzarella, who is one of Italy's most wanted fugitives.

Crime & Justice.headline: Patched gang member arrested after shoot-out at Huntly home
Crime & Justice.detail: A patched gang member has been arrested after guns were fired during a confrontation at a Huntly property this week; the 54-year-old has been charged with discharging a firearm at a person and participating in an organised criminal group.

Crime & Justice.headline: 2 dead in overnight Brampton shooting after altercation: police
Crime & Justice.detail: Two males, including a teen, are dead after an overnight shooting at a Brampton school Friday night; police say the incident appears targeted and are searching for suspects.

Education.headline: School Assembly News Headlines (April 5): Top National, World, Sports, Business News
Education.detail: A collection of top news headlines for school assemblies, covering national, world, sports and business events.

Education.headline: Japan Invites 1,000 Indian Master's, PhD Students For LOTUS 2026 Programme, Offers Up To Rs 25.6 Lakh
Education.detail: Japan has invited 1,000 Indian Master's and PhD students for the LOTUS 2026 Programme, offering financial assistance of up to Rs 25.6 Lakh.

Education.headline: Rajasthan High Court Upholds Single Bench Order Cancelling SI Recruitment Exam 2021
Education.detail: The Rajasthan High Court has upheld the single bench order cancelling the SI Recruitment Exam 2021 due to irregularities.

Education.headline: Lancaster joins India boom with new Bengaluru campus
Education.detail: Lancaster University is expanding its presence in India with a new campus in Bengaluru, joining a growing trend of international universities establishing a presence in the country.

Education.headline: Scholarships: April 4, 2026
Education.detail: Information on scholarships available as of April 4, 2026.

Lifestyle.headline: Homes will be cleaner 'in seconds' if you do 'one of the simplest tasks'
Lifestyle.detail: An easy task can help make homes cleaner in a matter of seconds.

Lifestyle.headline: Grass will grow greener and thicker with 1 Dobbies gardening method
Lifestyle.detail: Brits are being urged to act in April to transform tired lawns into greener, thicker grass ahead of summer.

Lifestyle.headline: How three volleyball players from Kerala started a thriving mushroom business
Lifestyle.detail: Three volleyball players from Kerala have started a successful mushroom business.

Lifestyle.headline: Gynecologist reveals 4 warning signs after menopause you should not ignore
Lifestyle.detail: A gynecologist shares four important warning signs that should not be ignored after menopause.

Lifestyle.headline: Chesney the kangaroo scales tall fence and flees petting zoo for three days on the lam
Lifestyle.detail: Chesney, a kangaroo, escaped from a petting zoo after scaling a tall fence and was on the loose for three days.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: A reset for PH
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Easter symbolizes renewal and new beginnings, a resurrection, or, in more modern terms, a comeback, a reboot, or a reset, and it's a time for national reckoning, given developments that affect Filipinos.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Maine's race to the top on taxes
Opinion/Editorial.detail: After opposing similar tax hikes in her state, Janet Mills is supporting a millionaires tax for Maine as she runs against Graham Platner in the Senate primary.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: The Guardian view on the US and Europe: the UK tried to be a bridge, but Trump likes to burn them
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The UK attempted to mediate between the US and Europe, but President Trump seems intent on damaging those relationships.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Editorial: To understand homelessness, listen to homeless people. Here's what I learned
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Los Angeles cannot thrive if there is one community of people safely in homes and another forced onto the sidewalks; understanding and listening to the homeless is key.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL CARTOON
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Editorial cartoon from the Taipei Times.

World.headline: One killed and buildings damaged as magnitude 7.4 earthquake strikes Indonesia
World.detail: A magnitude 7.4 earthquake struck Indonesia, causing damage to buildings and resulting in at least one fatality. The quake triggered panic in the region, with residents fleeing their homes.

World.headline: Search for missing US crew member of downed fighter jet enters second day
World.detail: The search continues for a U.S. crew member who went missing after a fighter jet was shot down. The incident has heightened tensions in the region.

World.headline: Trump says Iran has 48 hours to make deal as search for US pilot continues
World.detail: President Trump has given Iran a 48-hour ultimatum to make a deal or face consequences, as the search continues for a missing US pilot. The President did not reference a downed US jet in his post but pointed to a deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

World.headline: At least 15 killed in Russian attacks on Ukraine as Zelenskyy meets Erdogan
World.detail: Amidst ongoing conflict, at least 15 people have been killed in Russian attacks on Ukraine as President Zelenskyy meets with Erdogan in Turkey. The leaders are expected to discuss the possibility of a ceasefire and humanitarian aid.

World.headline: Two U.S. warplanes shot down; search ongoing in Iran for 1 missing crew member
World.detail: Two U.S. warplanes were shot down, and a search is underway in Iran for one missing crew member. The incidents come amidst heightened tensions in the region.

Zimbabwe.headline: NRZ appoints new Chief Executive Officer
Zimbabwe.detail: The National Railways of Zimbabwe (NRZ) has appointed a new Chief Executive Officer to lead the organization.

Zimbabwe.headline: Zimbabwean truck driver arrested in South Africa after alleged illegal U-turn resulting in multiple vehicle crash
Zimbabwe.detail: A Zimbabwean truck driver has been arrested in South Africa following an accident involving multiple vehicles, allegedly caused by an illegal U-turn.

Zimbabwe.headline: Warriors set to participate at Unity Cup in the United Kingdom
Zimbabwe.detail: Zimbabwe's Warriors are preparing to participate in the Unity Cup tournament in the United Kingdom.

Zimbabwe.headline: Mwaruwari frets over lack of goals as Highlanders draws against FC Platinum
Zimbabwe.detail: Mwaruwari expresses concern over the lack of goals as Highlanders draws against FC Platinum.

Zimbabwe.headline: Zimbabwe constitutional hearings rocked by abduction claims and violent clashes
Zimbabwe.detail: Public consultations on the proposed Constitutional Amendment No. 3 (CAB3) Bill have been overshadowed by reports of violence, intimidation, and alleged abductions, raising concerns about the integrity of the outreach process.
